title: croton bathianus
intro: Croton bathianus, also known as the Bath Island Croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, Euphorbiaceae. It is native to the Caribbean and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton bathianus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Croton bathianus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
